response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and a broad technical background, but lacks direct experience with the mandatory C++ on Windows and fixed-income/capital-markets domain expertise. Their diverse experience in other areas (e.g., AI, GIS, and web technologies) may offer transferable skills, but the core requirements are not met.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with modern languages (TypeScript, Node.js, React).
Proven track record in building scalable systems (e.g., micro-services, real-time data handling).
Strong communication and knowledge-sharing abilities (workshops, talks, open-source contributions).
concerns: No explicit C++ experience on Windows (mandatory for the role).
No demonstrated experience in fixed-income, capital markets, or investment banking domains.
Limited SQL Server/Oracle experience (SQL skills are listed but not emphasized in roles).
